name: Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor Camera
description:
Keep an eye on your home with clear 2K video and reliable WiFi 6 connectivity. The 3 MP sensor captures detailed indoor footage, while the PT design helps cover more of the room.

AI detection can recognize people and send real-time alerts. It also supports pet and baby crying detection, one-touch calling, 10X digital zoom, and local recording with a TF card up to 256GB.

✔️ 2K video with 3 MP sensor
✔️ AI human, pet, and baby crying detection
✔️ WiFi 6 with 2.4GHz wireless connection
✔️ Supports up to 256GB TF card storage
✔️ Flexible wall or ceiling installation
